title: Table rows duplication

posts.author: Yariv (Yariv Cohen)
posts.cookedHtml:
• Why is it that when i duplicate more than one row, the duplicated rows are being created at the bottom of the table ??? it is annoying !

  • Then, why is it that i can’t drag / move more than one row ? Annoying too !

  • And last annoying thing: why cant i decide how many times do i want to duplicate a row ??

Tnx
